meta_title: For Students: Antigravity project template to Solve stuck with basic apps (Beginner Idea List)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Beginner-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: For Students: Antigravity project template to Solve stuck with basic apps
content.seo_description: Learn how to use the Antigravity project template to overcome being stuck with basic apps. A Beginner-level guide using Antigravity and Claude Code.
content.answer_block: Stop building static tutorials and start shipping production-grade applications. By leveraging the Antigravity project template, you automate boilerplate architecture, allowing you to focus on core AI logic. Combine this with Claude Code to rapidly iterate, debug, and deploy sophisticated, real-world SaaS features that elevate your portfolio beyond basic student work.
content.intro:
The screen glows with the same 'To-Do List' app you’ve built for the fifth time. You feel the stagnation—you know the syntax, but you lack the architecture to build something that actually survives in the wild. You are currently trapped in the 'Tutorial Purgatory' where every project feels like a carbon copy of the last.

But the gap between a student project and a production app isn't talent; it’s infrastructure. The Antigravity project template acts as your scaffolding, providing the robust patterns professional engineers use daily. By integrating this with Claude Code, you transform from a coder following instructions into an architect commanding an AI-driven development lifecycle.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Foundation
steps.description: Establish a production-ready environment that handles environment variables, logging, and error boundaries automatically.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a new project using the Antigravity standard template with TypeScript, Supabase authentication, and Tailwind CSS configuration.

steps.title: Define the Business Logic Schema
steps.description: Map out your database relations and API endpoints to ensure the app handles real-world data flow.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a database schema for a SaaS dashboard that includes user profiles, project entities, and subscription tiers.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'Generate Prisma schema for the defined entities'

steps.title: Implement AI-Powered Features
steps.description: Integrate LLM capabilities using the template's pre-configured service layer to ensure scalability.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Add a service module that interfaces with the OpenAI API for structured JSON output and error handling.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'Add an AI service layer with robust retry logic'

steps.title: Automate Frontend Components
steps.description: Use component-driven development to build a UI that matches your backend architecture perfectly.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Build a responsive dashboard sidebar and dynamic data table using the Antigravity component library patterns.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'Generate UI components based on the current schema'

steps.title: Stress Test and Debug
steps.description: Identify bottlenecks and logical errors before deployment to ensure your app is launch-ready.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Run a comprehensive code audit on the current project to find potential memory leaks or security vulnerabilities.

pro_tips: Always use the template's built-in 'mock-data' generator to test your UI before hooking up the actual database.
Treat your Claude Code conversation history as a living documentation file; commit it to your repo.
Prioritize 'Type-Safety' in your Antigravity config; it prevents 90% of runtime errors in production.
Use the template's 'Middleware' folder to centralize all your authentication checks, keeping your routes clean.
Don't manually configure your CI/CD; use the Antigravity GitHub Actions workflow included in the template.
content.next_steps: Once your first project is live, focus on adding a 'Pro' feature like Stripe integration or a custom AI agent workflow to demonstrate complexity to potential employers.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting your code gather dust in private repositories. It is time to ship, scale, and show the world what you can actually build. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
